The '''AAC-2 hovertank''' was used during an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Strike on Yavin 4|strike]] on a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] base on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. They were all destroyed during the engagement in a nearly successful last-ditch effort to push back Imperial forces after the destruction of the blast doors on the temple that served as the [[Bothan High Command]]'s base.<ref name="BFII" />

{{Veh-stub}}

*''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]'' {{1st}}
